methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: Native CANTO/ETH held by LendingLedger (contract balance) used to pay claim() rewards
Implicit reward emission stream configured via cantoPerBlock[epoch] (future obligations to users)
cNOTE deposits are NOT held by this contract (only accounted); actual cNOTE resides in external lending markets
state_assets: gaugeController (external contract reference used for relative weights)
lendingMarketWhitelist[market] (authorized caller set for sync_ledger and update/claim eligibility)
userInfo[market][lender]: { amount, rewardDebt, secRewardDebt } (per-market per-user accounting; affects claim amounts)
marketInfo[market]: { accCantoPerShare, secRewardsPerShare, lastRewardBlock } (global per-market reward indices)
lendingMarketTotalBalance[market] (tracked total supply used as denominator for per-share reward accrual)
privilege_assets: Governance authority over: setGovernance(), setRewards(), whiteListLendingMarket()
Whitelist authority gating reward accrual/claims and gating which markets can safely call sync_ledger() (via update_market require)
Ability to influence reward distribution via gaugeController dependency (governance chooses gaugeController address only at deployment; thereafter depends on GaugeController's own admin)
reputation_assets: Correctness/fairness of reward distribution (accCantoPerShare accounting) and user trust in claimability
Secondary reward accounting fields (secRewardDebt/secRewardsPerShare) relied upon by third parties reading state
Protocol integrity regarding whitelisted market behavior and total balance synchronization

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: LendingLedger has no inheritance. It imports interfaces/libraries (GaugeController, VotingEscrow (unused), OpenZeppelin Math, SafeERC20/IERC20 (unused)).
external_dependencies: @openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol and IERC20 (imported but not used in this contract)
VotingEscrow (imported but not used in this contract)
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: None detected (no proxy hooks, no initializers, constructor-based deployment).
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Single-admin model via governance address and onlyGovernance modifier (require(msg.sender == governance)). Whitelist gating for markets enforced in update_market() and thereby transitively in sync_ledger() and claim().

state_changes: cantoPerBlock[epoch] for epoch in [_fromEpoch.._toEpoch] step BLOCK_EPOCH

upgradeability_surface.notes: No proxy/initializer pattern; constructor sets governance and gaugeController.
